title: Reading Passage: Online Learning
passage: Online learning has become more common in recent years. Many students use digital platforms to watch lessons, complete quizzes, and communicate with teachers. Although online learning is flexible, it also requires discipline. Students who do not manage their time well may fall behind. However, when used properly, online education can help learners study at their own pace and access materials from anywhere.

questions.q: What is one benefit of online learning?
What problem may students face?

title: Reading Passage: Public Transport
passage: Public transport plays a crucial role in reducing traffic congestion in large cities. Buses, trains, and metro systems allow thousands of people to travel efficiently. Nevertheless, some people still prefer private cars because they are more convenient. To encourage public transport use, governments need to improve safety, reliability, and comfort.

questions.q: According to the passage, why is public transport important?
What should governments improve?

title: Listening Lesson 1: Campus Tour
media: Audio/video placeholder. Add your own MP3 or YouTube embed later.
transcript: Welcome to the campus tour. First, we will visit the library. Then, we will go to the science building. At the end of the tour, you can ask questions about student clubs and scholarships.

questions.q: Where will they go first?
What can students ask about at the end?

title: Listening Lesson 2: Study Plan
media: Audio/video placeholder. Add your own MP3 or YouTube embed later.
transcript: For IELTS preparation, it is better to study consistently. Spend twenty minutes reviewing vocabulary, thirty minutes practicing grammar, and ten minutes speaking aloud every day.

questions.q: How long should learners review vocabulary?
What should learners do for ten minutes?

title: Reading Module 1: Online Learning
passage: Online learning allows students to access lessons from anywhere. It offers flexibility, but learners need discipline and clear goals. Some students benefit from recorded lessons because they can pause and review difficult parts. However, others miss face-to-face interaction and may feel isolated. Overall, digital learning works best when teachers combine technology with active guidance. This module focuses on education vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
According to the passage, what is one possible challenge?
options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

questions.q: Write one benefit mentioned in the passage.
Complete: The passage suggests that good planning can improve _____.

title: Reading Module 2: Public Transport
passage: Public transport can reduce congestion and air pollution in large cities. Buses, trains, and metro systems move many people using less road space than private cars. Nevertheless, some citizens avoid public transport if it is crowded, unreliable, or unsafe. To increase usage, governments should improve comfort, frequency, and affordability. This module focuses on transport vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
According to the passage, what is one possible challenge?
options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

questions.q: Write one benefit mentioned in the passage.
Complete: The passage suggests that good planning can improve _____.

title: Reading Module 3: Healthy Lifestyle
passage: A healthy lifestyle is influenced by diet, exercise, sleep, and stress management. Many young people understand the importance of health, yet they often struggle to maintain good habits. Schools and families can support healthier routines by providing accurate information and encouraging regular physical activity. This module focuses on health vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
According to the passage, what is one possible challenge?
options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

questions.q: Write one benefit mentioned in the passage.
Complete: The passage suggests that good planning can improve _____.

title: Reading Module 4: Renewable Energy
passage: Renewable energy sources such as solar and wind power are becoming more common. They can reduce dependence on fossil fuels and lower emissions. However, renewable systems may require high initial investment and stable infrastructure. In the long term, cleaner energy can support sustainable economic growth. This module focuses on environment vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
According to the passage, what is one possible challenge?
options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

questions.q: Write one benefit mentioned in the passage.
Complete: The passage suggests that good planning can improve _____.

title: Reading Module 5: Urban Housing
passage: Housing has become a major challenge in many urban areas. As more people move to cities, demand for affordable homes increases. High prices can force families to live far from their workplaces. Urban planners need to balance housing, transport, green space, and public facilities. This module focuses on society vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
According to the passage, what is one possible challenge?
options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

questions.q: Write one benefit mentioned in the passage.
Complete: The passage suggests that good planning can improve _____.

title: Reading Module 6: Artificial Intelligence
passage: Artificial intelligence is changing the way people study and work. It can help users summarize information, correct writing, and generate ideas. However, people should not rely on AI without checking accuracy. The most effective users treat AI as a tool rather than a replacement for critical thinking. This module focuses on technology vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
According to the passage, what is one possible challenge?
options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

questions.q: Write one benefit mentioned in the passage.
Complete: The passage suggests that good planning can improve _____.

title: Reading Module 7: Tourism and Culture
passage: Tourism can bring income to local communities and create jobs. It also allows visitors to learn about different cultures. On the other hand, excessive tourism may damage historical places and disturb residents. Responsible tourism requires respect for local traditions and environmental limits. This module focuses on culture vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
According to the passage, what is one possible challenge?
options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

questions.q: Write one benefit mentioned in the passage.

title: Reading Module 8: Work From Home
passage: Remote work has become more popular because digital tools allow people to communicate online. It can save commuting time and improve flexibility. However, some employees find it difficult to separate work and personal life. Companies need clear rules to maintain productivity and well-being. This module focuses on work vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

title: Reading Module 9: Plastic Waste
passage: Plastic waste is a serious environmental problem because many plastic products take a long time to break down. Reducing single-use plastic, improving recycling systems, and encouraging reusable products can help. Individuals, businesses, and governments all have roles in solving this issue. This module focuses on environment vocabulary and IELTS-style comprehension.

options: It may create a problem if not managed well
questions.answer: It may create a problem if not managed well

title: Reading Module 10: Financial Literacy
passage: Financial literacy helps people make better decisions about saving, spending, and investing. Young people often receive little practical education about money. transcript: A student talks to a clinic receptionist about symptoms, appointment time, insurance, and required documents. Listen for names, numbers, locations, reasons, and key academic vocabulary.

questions.q: What is the main situation?
Write two key details you heard.
Complete: The speaker gives information about _____.

title: Listening Lesson 26: Travel Plan
source: Paste BBC Learning English / IELTS YouTube URL in the Add YouTube Lesson box.
transcript: Two friends plan a weekend trip, compare transport options, accommodation, budget, and weather conditions. Listen for names, numbers, locations, reasons, and key academic vocabulary.

questions.q: What is the main situation?
